caption: A website for TFNN.com, with the tagline "EDUCATING INVESTORS," is displayed. The page features a headline that reads "GOLD REPORT NEWSLETTER BY TOM O'BRIEN" next to an image of "The Gold Report" by Tom O'Brien. Below the headline is a "SUBSCRIBE" button and a biographical paragraph stating that Tom O'Brien is the founder and CEO of TFNN (Tiger Financial News Network). The text continues, "As a precious metal, gold is still king. It continues to hold the most effective safe haven and hedging properties across the global major trading hubs of the London OTC market, the US futures market, and the Shanghai Gold Exchange!" Navigation links at the top include "HOME," "TIGER TV," "NEWSLETTERS," "SERVICES," "ABOUT," and "ADVERTISING," with an "Account" link on the far right. The screen remains static across the sequence, with no visible people, movement, or changes in content.
